workflow-maker-checker.description: Replay the regulatory-drift workflow through governance publication, assignment, evidence collection, maker-checker approval, remediation, and audit-ledger projection.

workflow-committee.description: Replay the committee-based workflow through publication, queue routing, fixed-quorum approval, and remediation dispatch.

entity-reporting.description: Replay multi-entity reporting and access-control checks using the reference hierarchy, scoping, isolation, roll-up, and reporting models.
